section.div: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.
Your favorite Terminal Coding Agent, now in Rust
AI-powered geopolitical strategy simulation. Three great powers compete for territory, resources, and global dominance on an interactive map.
